cogni-ai-agent-auditor.description: Expert autonomous auditor specializing in analyzing agent session logs, evaluating reasoning workflows, and generating visual reports.

cogni-ai-brain-ops.description: Autonomous brainstorming agent responsible for gathering facts, describing constraints, and architecting suggested plans and tasks.

cogni-ai-code-reviewer.description: Elite autonomous code reviewer for PR analysis, quality enforcement, and deep code verification.

cogni-ai-context7-ops.description: Uses Context7-backed documentation context for research and delegation tasks.

cogni-ai-devops.description: Elite autonomous DevOps and Site Reliability Engineering agent focusing on task automation, CI/CD pipeline precision, and infrastructure-as-code.

cogni-ai-docs-editor.description: Autonomous documentation editor responsible for creating, updating, and maintaining project documentation.

cogni-ai-fact-ops.description: Autonomous fact operator responsible for maintaining canonical fact files and information consistency.

cogni-ai-github-ops.description: Autonomous GitHub Operator responsible for GitHub operations such as modifying comments, issues, or discussions on behalf of other agents.

cogni-ai-manager.description: Autonomous manager agent responsible for coordinating tasks and delegating work to other agents.

cogni-ai-plan-reviewer.description: Elite autonomous architectural reviewer for plan validation and ensuring strategic alignment.

cogni-ai-python-dev.description: Autonomous Python Developer responsible for writing, testing, and debugging Python 3 code.

cogni-ai-security-auditor.description: Elite autonomous security auditor specializing in zero-defect threat modeling, vulnerability detection, and hardening system boundaries.

cogni-ai-tester.description: Autonomous Tester responsible for executing test tasks, ensuring quality, and verifying system behavior.
